Views.description: A structure with a list of objects with details for each of the specified views.

Errors.description: If any of the specified ARNs result in an error, then this structure describes the error.

Owner.description: The Amazon Web Services account that owns this view.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when this view was last modified.

Scope.description:
An Amazon resource name (ARN) of an Amazon Web Services account, an organization, or an organizational unit (OU) that specifies whether this view includes resources from only the specified Amazon Web Services account, all accounts in the specified organization, or all accounts in the specified OU.

If not specified, the value defaults to the Amazon Web Services account used to call this operation.

IncludedProperties.description: A structure that contains additional information about the view.

Filters.description: An array of SearchFilter objects that specify which resources can be included in the results of queries made using this view.

FilterString.description: The string that contains the search keywords, prefixes, and operators to control the results that can be returned by a Search operation. For more details, see Search query syntax.

Arn.description: The ARN of the new local index for the Region. You can reference this ARN in IAM permission policies to authorize the following operations: DeleteIndex | GetIndex | UpdateIndexType | CreateView

State.description:
Indicates the current state of the index. You can check for changes to the state for asynchronous operations by calling the GetIndex operation.

The state can remain in the CREATING or UPDATING state for several hours as Resource Explorer discovers the information about your resources and populates the index.

CreatedAt.description: The date and timestamp when the index was created.

TaskId.description: The unique identifier for the deletion task. Use this ID with GetResourceExplorerSetup to monitor the progress of the deletion operation.

OrgConfiguration.description: Details about the organization, and whether configuration is ENABLED or DISABLED.

AWSServiceAccessStatus.description: This value displays whether your Amazon Web Services service access is ENABLED or DISABLED.

ServiceLinkedRole.description: This value shows whether or not you have a valid a service-linked role required to start the multi-account search feature.

ViewArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the view that is the current default for the Amazon Web Services Region in which you called this operation.

Type.description: The type of the index in this Region. For information about the aggregator index and how it differs from a local index, see Turning on cross-Region search by creating an aggregator index.

State.description: The current state of the index in this Amazon Web Services Region.

ReplicatingFrom.description:
This response value is present only if this index is Type=AGGREGATOR.

A list of the Amazon Web Services Regions that replicate their content to the index in this Region.

ReplicatingTo.description:
This response value is present only if this index is Type=LOCAL.

The Amazon Web Services Region that contains the aggregator index, if one exists. If an aggregator index does exist then the Region in which you called this operation replicates its index information to the Region specified in this response value.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time when the index was originally created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when the index was last updated.

Tags.description: Tag key and value pairs that are attached to the index.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Resource Explorer index in the current Region.

Type.description: The type of the index. Valid values are LOCAL (contains resources from the current Region only) or AGGREGATOR (contains replicated resource information from all Regions).

Indexes.description: A structure that contains the details and status of each index.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

Region.description: The Amazon Web Services Region in which the index exists.

Type.description:
The type of index. It can be one of the following values:

  • LOCAL – The index contains information about resources from only the same Amazon Web Services Region.

  • AGGREGATOR – Resource Explorer replicates copies of the indexed information about resources in all other Amazon Web Services Regions to the aggregator index. This lets search results in the Region with the aggregator index to include resources from all Regions in the account where Resource Explorer is turned on.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

ManagedViews.description: The list of managed views available in the Amazon Web Services Region in which you called this operation.

Resources.description: The list of structures that describe the resources that match the query.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

ViewArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the view that this operation used to perform the search.

OwningAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account that owns the resource.

Region.description: The Amazon Web Services Region in which the resource was created and exists.

Service.description: The Amazon Web Services service that owns the resource and is responsible for creating and updating it.

LastReportedAt.description: The date and time that Resource Explorer last queried this resource and updated the index with the latest information about the resource.

Properties.description: A structure with additional type-specific details about the resource. These properties can be added by turning on integration between Resource Explorer and other Amazon Web Services services.

Indexes.description: A list of Index objects that describe the Resource Explorer indexes found in the specified Regions.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to use in a subsequent ListServiceIndexes request to retrieve the next set of results.

Region.description: The Amazon Web Services Region in which the index exists.

Type.description:
The type of index. It can be one of the following values:

  • LOCAL – The index contains information about resources from only the same Amazon Web Services Region.

  • AGGREGATOR – Resource Explorer replicates copies of the indexed information about resources in all other Amazon Web Services Regions to the aggregator index. This lets search results in the Region with the aggregator index to include resources from all Regions in the account where Resource Explorer is turned on.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to use in a subsequent ListServiceViews request to retrieve the next set of results.

ServiceViews.description: A list of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) for the service views available in the current Amazon Web Services account.

StreamingAccessForServices.description: A list of Amazon Web Services services that have streaming access to your Resource Explorer data, including details about when the access was granted.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

ServicePrincipal.description: The service principal of the Amazon Web Services service that has streaming access to your Resource Explorer data. A service principal is a unique identifier for an Amazon Web Services service.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time when streaming access was granted to the Amazon Web Services service, in ISO 8601 format.

ResourceTypes.description: The list of resource types supported by Resource Explorer.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

Service.description: The Amazon Web Services service that is associated with the resource type. This is the primary service that lets you create and interact with resources of this type.

ResourceType.description: The unique identifier of the resource type.

Views.description: The list of views available in the Amazon Web Services Region in which you called this operation.

NextToken.description: If present, indicates that more output is available than is included in the current response. Use this value in the NextToken request parameter in a subsequent call to the operation to get the next part of the output. You should repeat this until the NextToken response element comes back as null. The pagination tokens expire after 24 hours.

ViewArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the view that the operation set as the default for queries made in the Amazon Web Services Region and Amazon Web Services account in which you called this operation.

TaskId.description: The unique identifier for the setup task. Use this ID with GetResourceExplorerSetup to monitor the progress of the configuration operation.

View.description: A structure that contains the details about the new view.

Owner.description: The Amazon Web Services account that owns this view.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when this view was last modified.

Scope.description:
An Amazon resource name (ARN) of an Amazon Web Services account, an organization, or an organizational unit (OU) that specifies whether this view includes resources from only the specified Amazon Web Services account, all accounts in the specified organization, or all accounts in the specified OU.

If not specified, the value defaults to the Amazon Web Services account used to call this operation.

IncludedProperties.description: A structure that contains additional information about the view.

Filters.description: An array of SearchFilter objects that specify which resources can be included in the results of queries made using this view.

FilterString.description: The string that contains the search keywords, prefixes, and operators to control the results that can be returned by a Search operation. For more details, see Search query syntax.

Arn.description:
The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the index that you successfully started the deletion process.

This operation is asynchronous. To check its status, call the GetIndex operation.

State.description: Indicates the current state of the index.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when you last updated this index.

ViewArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the view that you successfully deleted.

ManagedViewArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the managed view.

TrustedService.description: The service principal of the Amazon Web Services service that created and manages the managed view.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when this managed view was last modified.

Owner.description: The Amazon Web Services account that owns this managed view.

Scope.description: An Amazon resource name (ARN) of an Amazon Web Services account or organization that specifies whether this managed view includes resources from only the specified Amazon Web Services account or all accounts in the specified organization.

IncludedProperties.description: A structure that contains additional information about the managed view.

Filters.description: A search filter defines which resources can be part of a search query result set.

FilterString.description: The string that contains the search keywords, prefixes, and operators to control the results that can be returned by a Search operation. For more details, see Search query syntax.

ResourcePolicy.description: The resource policy that defines access to the managed view. To learn more about this policy, review Managed views.

Regions.description: A list of Region status objects that describe the current state of Resource Explorer configuration in each Region.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to use in a subsequent GetResourceExplorerSetup request to retrieve the next set of results.

Region.description: The Amazon Web Services Region for which this status information applies.

Index.description: The status information for the Resource Explorer index in this Region.

Status.description: The current status of the index operation. Valid values are SUCCEEDED, FAILED, IN_PROGRESS, or SKIPPED.

Index.description:
An index is the data store used by Amazon Web Services Resource Explorer to hold information about your Amazon Web Services resources that the service discovers. Creating an index in an Amazon Web Services Region turns on Resource Explorer and lets it discover your resources.

By default, an index is local, meaning that it contains information about resources in only the same Region as the index. However, you can promote the index of one Region in the account by calling UpdateIndexType to convert it into an aggregator index. The aggregator index receives a replicated copy of the index information from all other Regions where Resource Explorer is turned on. This allows search operations in that Region to return results from all Regions in the account.

Region.description: The Amazon Web Services Region in which the index exists.

Type.description:
The type of index. It can be one of the following values:

  • LOCAL – The index contains information about resources from only the same Amazon Web Services Region.

  • AGGREGATOR – Resource Explorer replicates copies of the indexed information about resources in all other Amazon Web Services Regions to the aggregator index. This lets search results in the Region with the aggregator index to include resources from all Regions in the account where Resource Explorer is turned on.

ErrorDetails.description: Details about any error that occurred during the index operation.

Code.description: The error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

Message.description: A human-readable description of the error that occurred.

View.description: The status information for the Resource Explorer view in this Region.

Status.description: The current status of the view operation. Valid values are SUCCEEDED, FAILED, IN_PROGRESS, or SKIPPED.

View.description: A view is a structure that defines a set of filters that provide a view into the information in the Amazon Web Services Resource Explorer index. The filters specify which information from the index is visible to the users of the view. For example, you can specify filters that include only resources that are tagged with the key "ENV" and the value "DEVELOPMENT" in the results returned by this view. You could also create a second view that includes only resources that are tagged with "ENV" and "PRODUCTION".

Owner.description: The Amazon Web Services account that owns this view.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when this view was last modified.

Scope.description:
An Amazon resource name (ARN) of an Amazon Web Services account, an organization, or an organizational unit (OU) that specifies whether this view includes resources from only the specified Amazon Web Services account, all accounts in the specified organization, or all accounts in the specified OU.

If not specified, the value defaults to the Amazon Web Services account used to call this operation.

IncludedProperties.description: A structure that contains additional information about the view.

Message.description: A human-readable description of the error that occurred.

View.description: A ServiceView object that contains the details and configuration of the requested service view.
